details: repo_structure: reports/board/ directory is missing. All other expected top-level dirs (src/, scripts/, reports/, memory_bank/, docs/, validation/, .cursor/) and reports/audit/ are present.
governance_contracts_present: reports/board/ directory is missing. memory_bank/ (6 docs), .cursor/automations/ (README + 5 spec pairs), and reports/audit/ are present.

no_clawdbot_moltbot: moltbot/ directory exists with active code (board.py, orchestrator.py, sentinel.py, memory_evolution.py, promotion_discipline.py). Scripts reference moltbot: scripts/run_molt_workflow.py, scripts/run_openclaw_molt_synthesis.py, scripts/sre/run_sre_anomaly_scan.py. Note: moltbot is documented in MEMORY_BANK_ALPACA.md as a learning workflow component (§ NO-APPLY). Clawdbot directory does not exist (removal confirmed).
